parameters.jsCode:
const accounts = [
  { handle: 'byjoeym', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'pedrovaleriolopez', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'dougdemarco_', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'franklim.gui', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'thegrowthceo', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'chase.h.ai', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'thevibefounder', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'godofprompt', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'philipisberg', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'daniel.avell', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'stevearnesonofficial', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'noevarner.ai', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'nateherkai', platform: 'instagram' }
];
return accounts.map(a => ({ json: a }));

// Build the Supabase INSERT payload safely using JSON.stringify for all text fields
const account = $input.first().json;
const post = $('Parse & Merge All Items').item.json;

const payload = {
  account_id: (account.id || null),
  post_id: post.post_id,
  post_url: post.post_url,
  source_account: post.source_account,
  format: post.format,
  caption_as_script: post.caption_as_script || '',
  hook_text: post.hook_text || '',
  hook_type: post.hook_type || 'curiosity_gap',
  hook_text_refined: post.hook_text_refined || '',
  content_topic: post.content_topic || '',
  keywords: post.keywords || [],
  key_phrases: post.key_phrases || [],
  narrative_structure: post.narrative_structure || {},
  trigger_emotions: post.trigger_emotions || [],
  solutions_presented: post.solutions_presented || '',
  transformation_promised: post.transformation_promised || '',
  objections_handled: post.objections_handled || [],
  cta_type: post.cta_type || 'none',
  cta_text: post.cta_text || '',
  why_it_worked: post.why_it_worked || '',
  buy_trigger: post.buy_trigger || 'curiosity',
  content_pillars: post.content_pillars || [],
  applicable_formats: post.applicable_formats || [],
  replicable_structure: post.replicable_structure || '',
  hashtags: post.hashtags || [],
  runa_product_fit: post.runa_product_fit || 'NONE',
  relevance_score: post.relevance_score || 0,
  likes: post.likes || 0,
  comments: post.comments || 0,
  views: post.views !== undefined && post.views !== null ? post.views : null,
  engagement_score: post.engagement_score || 0,
  posted_at: post.posted_at || null,
  analyzed_at: new Date().toISOString()
};

return [{ json: { supabase_payload: payload } }];
